title: Convex Deployment
description: Schema representing a Convex deployment, which is a runtime environment where Convex backend functions execute. Deployments have a unique name that forms the subdomain of their URL (e.g. happy-otter-123.convex.cloud). Each deployment has its own database, file storage, scheduled functions, and environment variable configuration.

id.description: Unique integer identifier for the deployment assigned by Convex.

name.description: Unique name of the deployment used as the subdomain of the deployment URL (e.g. 'happy-otter-123').

deployment_type.description: The type of deployment environment, determining its lifecycle and usage context.

deployment_class.description: The compute class determining resource limits (memory, concurrency) and pricing tier.

region.description: The cloud region where this deployment runs.

project_id.description: ID of the project that owns this deployment.

url.description: The base HTTPS URL of the deployment in the format https://{name}.convex.cloud.

environment_variables.description: Environment variables configured for this deployment, accessible to backend functions at runtime via process.env.

custom_domains.description: Custom domain names associated with this deployment.

EnvironmentVariable.description: A key-value environment variable configured on a Convex deployment. Environment variables are accessible to all backend functions at runtime.

name.description: The environment variable key name following standard naming conventions.

value.description: The environment variable value. May contain connection strings, API keys, or other configuration data.

CustomDomain.description: A custom domain name associated with a Convex deployment for routing external traffic.

request_destination.description: Routing destination for requests to this domain. convexCloud routes to the function API (queries, mutations, actions); convexSite routes to HTTP action endpoints.

DeployKey.description: A deploy key used to authenticate the Convex CLI or CI/CD pipelines when pushing function code to a deployment.

name.description: Human-readable name for the deploy key.

deployment_name.description: The name of the deployment this key is scoped to.

key.description: The deploy key value. Only present immediately after creation; not returned by subsequent list operations.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this deploy key was created.

Project.description: A Convex project, which is the top-level organizational unit grouping related deployments.

id.description: Unique integer identifier for the project.

slug.description: Human-readable URL-safe identifier for the project within the team.

team_id.description: ID of the team that owns this project.
